---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of the feature you are proposing.

## Use case

Why would this be useful? Who would use it?

## Proposed solution

How do you think this could work? (e.g. new cmdlet, new parameter, different output format)

## Additional context

Any other context, examples, or references.
